verification_gate: Every accepted peer has source provenance, capability boundaries, baseline commands, expected outputs, dependency edges, and a no-loss parity gate.
proof_summary: PRESERVE-002 is a definition task (proof-cell, simulation_required FALSE): it defines, per peer, the six gate elements before any capability enters LifeOS. Enumerated all 42 live .git peers under /home/flexnetos/meta/src/ (including the lifeos consolidation-target row, per the validator contract) and emitted one baseline row each in generated/preserve_provenance_baselines.csv, mirrored structurally in generated/preserve_capability_provenance.json. Each row carries source provenance (remote origin URL + 40-char HEAD + branch + clone-vs-worktree kind + dirty/clean state), a capability boundary drawn from each repo's own manifest/README, a baseline verification command by detected toolchain (cargo test / uv+pytest / bun test / nu / nix flake check / git-fsck fallback), the expected passing output, dependency edges to the downstream LifeOS consumer or governing task, license, last-verified evidence, and a no-loss parity gate encoding the North Star upgrade-only law (adopt-in-place at pinned HEAD; peer suite green before AND after any move; no capability removed). 11 accepted-core peers are the ones the gate's 'every accepted peer' clause binds (nu_plugin, envctl, handoff, rusty-idd, meta-ruvector, notebooklm-py, beads_rust, prompt_hub, loop_lib, meta_plugin_protocol, yazelix); candidate/infra/worktree rows are inventoried for completeness. Seven peers have no resolvable SPDX license file and are flagged for resolution before adoption (not a blocker to the definition gate). Note: this task's declared target_artifacts name generated/task_families/PRESERVE-002.json and generated/capability_provenance.json; per the executing lane's file-ownership scope those artifacts are delivered under the preserve_* prefix (preserve_provenance_baselines.csv + preserve_capability_provenance.json) — content-equivalent, filenames diverge from the un-editable CSV row declaration.

live_commands.purpose: Enumerate live .git peers under the meta src root (read-only)
live_commands.command: for d in */; do [ -e "$d/.git" ] && echo "$d"; done
output: 42 peer directories with .git (clone or worktree), including lifeos as the consolidation target

live_commands.purpose: Capture per-peer provenance (remote, HEAD, branch, dirty/clean)
live_commands.command: git remote -v; git rev-parse HEAD; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git status --porcelain
output: One provenance row per peer written to generated/preserve_provenance_baselines.csv

live_commands.purpose: Verify definition artifacts against the failing-first validator
live_commands.command: uv run --no-project --with pytest python -m pytest test_preserve_artifacts.py -k provenance
